inputs.prompt: Build outcomes, logs, reports, and pipeline performance data
inputs.context: Pipeline context including failures, timings, routing logs, and release notes

outputs.primary: Postmortem report with prioritized recommendations and measurable follow-ups
outputs.format: Structured report: patterns, root causes, recommendations, and next-iteration action items

failure_handling.on_missing_data: State gaps explicitly; infer cautiously; propose instrumentation improvements
failure_handling.on_conflicting_signals: Request more evidence; prioritize reproducible metrics and logs
